title: @exittype — live demo
description: Builder command that tags an exit's TYPE attribute; the look command groups exits into sections by that value, sorted alphabetically.

steps.note: @exittype <exit>=<value> stores the TYPE attribute on the exit. Equivalent to `&type <exit>=<value>`.

steps.expect: Set TYPE on Inn to tavern

steps.note: Empty value clears the attribute. The look command then falls back to cardinal auto-detect or the default "exit" bucket.
Targets that aren't exits, or that the builder can't edit, get a flat refusal — no attribute write.
